reasoning: The primary limiter is the poor lactate clearance indicated by the 9.3% power drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. The focus on over-unders directly targets this by improving lactate processing and aerobic base, building the fatigue resistance needed for the Ascending Alpine Loop's main climb. The recent ride suggests you're in a recovering phase, so we will incorporate targeted intensity to challenge this weak point.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of Over-Unders: 5 min @ 242-256W followed by 5 min @ 209-223W. Repeat 3 times with 5 min easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
